rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods logic, not just in a background list. In Study 2, the authors explicitly justify their identity-salience essay prime by citing Puntoni et al. (2011) as prior evidence that this priming approach can increase identity accessibility, and later reiterate that their manipulation is modeled after such procedures. This indicates a meaningful methodological role for the citation in how the empirical design is implemented.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Puntoni et al. (2011)'s identity-salience priming approach (essay writing) to a new domain, using it to manipulate identity salience when testing resistance to automation. The cited work serves as methodological precedent for this manipulation strategy.
